title: International application of Part
doc_html:
§4251.103. International application of Part

            A court of this state may treat a foreign country as if it were a state for the purpose of applying this Part and Parts 2, 3, and 5 of this Chapter.

            Acts 2016, No. 333, §1.
doc_text:
§4251.103.  International application of Part
A court of this state may treat a foreign country as if it were a state for the purpose
of applying this Part and Parts 2, 3, and 5 of this Chapter.
Acts 2016, No. 333, §1.
